metadata.title: CreatorAI | AI Video Generation Platform
metadata.description: Turn text prompts into hyper-realistic cinematic experiences. No cameras, no crew, just pure imagination.

showcase.title: Your Studio in Your Pocket
showcase.subtitle: Professional-grade video creation tools, designed for mobile-first creators who move fast.
showcase.aiEditingDesc: Intelligent scene composition and automated color grading powered by advanced AI models.
showcase.oneTapDesc: Export to any platform in seconds. Optimized formats for TikTok, Reels, and Shorts.
showcase.libraryDesc: Organize, search, and remix your creations with AI-powered asset management.
showcase.previewDesc: See your changes instantly with live preview rendering before final export.

howItWorks.title: The Obsidian Workflow
howItWorks.subtitle: Three steps from imagination to viral reality. Powered by the world's most advanced latent diffusion models.
howItWorks.promptDesc: Input your vision. Our LLM-enhanced parser transforms simple sentences into complex cinematic directives.
howItWorks.renderDesc: Our clusters render high-fidelity temporal coherent frames, maintaining style and physics with zero ghosting.
howItWorks.exportDesc: One-tap export in Full HD and instant social distribution. Optimized for TikTok, Reels, and YouTube Shorts.

features.title: Everything You Need to Create
features.subtitle: Six powerful tools that transform how you make video content.
features.aiScriptDesc: Generate engaging scripts from a single prompt. Our AI understands trending formats, hooks, and storytelling patterns that drive engagement.
features.voiceCloneDesc: Clone any voice with just 30 seconds of audio. Create consistent branded content with your signature voice across all videos.
features.styleTransferDesc: Apply cinematic styles from reference images or presets. Transform footage into anime, film noir, cyberpunk, or any aesthetic.
features.autoEditDesc: AI analyzes your footage and creates perfectly timed cuts, transitions, and effects synced to the rhythm of your content.
features.musicSyncDesc: Automatic beat detection and scene synchronization. Your visuals dance with the music — every cut lands on the beat.
features.multiExportDesc: One-click export optimized for every platform. 9:16 for TikTok, 4:5 for Instagram, 16:9 for YouTube — all from one project.

useCases.title: Built for Every Platform
useCases.subtitle: Create content that performs on the platforms that matter most.
useCases.tiktokDesc: Create scroll-stopping short-form content with trending effects, transitions, and AI-generated scripts optimized for the For You Page.
useCases.instagramDesc: Produce professional Reels and Stories with cinematic quality. Auto-format for feed, stories, and reels with one tap.
useCases.youtubeDesc: Turn long-form ideas into viral Shorts with AI summarization, dynamic captions, and attention-grabbing hooks.

pricing.title: Designed for Creators
pricing.subtitle: Pay per credit. 1 credit = 1 second of video. Scale as you grow.

testimonials.title: Loved by Creators
testimonials.subtitle: Join thousands of creators who are already transforming their content.
testimonials.sarahQuote: CreatorAI completely changed my workflow. I went from spending hours editing to producing three videos a day. My engagement tripled in the first month.
testimonials.davidQuote: The style transfer feature is insane. I can match the look of any reference in seconds. My clients think I have a whole production team.
testimonials.mayaQuote: I was skeptical about AI video tools, but CreatorAI actually understands what makes content viral. The AI scripts are genuinely good.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about CreatorAI.
faq.pricingQ: Is CreatorAI really free to start?
faq.pricingA: Yes! The Free plan gives you 10 credits per month with standard quality. No credit card required. Upgrade anytime for more credits and Full HD (1080p) output.
faq.qualityQ: What video quality can I expect?
faq.qualityA: The Free plan renders at 720p. Starter, Pro, and Studio plans include Full HD (1080p) output with our proprietary enhancement engine, producing cinema-grade results suitable for professional use.
faq.formatsA: We support MP4 (H.264/H.265), MOV, and WebM. Each export is automatically optimized for your target platform — TikTok (9:16), Instagram (4:5, 1:1, 9:16), YouTube (16:9, 9:16).
faq.aiModelsQ: What AI models does CreatorAI use?
faq.aiModelsA: We use a proprietary blend of state-of-the-art diffusion models, fine-tuned for video generation. Director and Studio plans get early access to beta models as they're released.
faq.commercialQ: Can I use generated content commercially?
faq.commercialA: Yes! All content generated on paid plans (Director and Studio) is fully licensed for commercial use, including social media, advertising, and client work.
faq.languagesA: CreatorAI's AI understands prompts in 40+ languages. The interface is available in English and Hebrew, with more languages coming soon.
faq.apiAccessA: Yes, Studio plan subscribers get dedicated API access for integrating CreatorAI into custom workflows, apps, and automation pipelines. Full documentation is available.
faq.refundA: We offer a 14-day money-back guarantee on all paid plans. If you're not satisfied, contact us within 14 days for a full refund — no questions asked.

cta.title: Stay in the Loop
cta.subtitle: Get creator tips, product updates, and exclusive offers delivered to your inbox. Join 50,000+ creators already subscribed.

footer.description: AI-powered video generation platform. Turn text into cinematic content in seconds.

apiPage.metaDescription: Programmatic video generation with the CreatorAI API. Generate videos, clone voices, transfer styles, and more — all via simple REST endpoints.
apiPage.title: CreatorAI API
apiPage.subtitle: Programmatic video generation for developers. Integrate AI-powered video creation directly into your apps, workflows, and automation pipelines.
apiPage.featuresSubtitle: Powerful endpoints designed for seamless integration into any stack.
apiPage.textToVideoDesc: Generate cinematic videos from text prompts via a single API call. Control style, duration, resolution, and aspect ratio.
apiPage.voiceCloningDesc: Clone voices from audio samples and synthesize speech for your videos. Consistent branded narration at scale.
apiPage.styleTransferDesc: Apply visual styles programmatically — anime, film noir, cyberpunk, or upload custom reference images.
apiPage.batchDesc: Submit hundreds of generation jobs in a single request. Perfect for content pipelines and automated workflows.
apiPage.webhooksDesc: Get notified when jobs complete. No polling required — receive real-time status updates to your endpoint.
apiPage.analyticsDesc: Track generation counts, processing times, and costs. Detailed usage breakdowns via API or dashboard.
apiPage.codePreviewSubtitle: A few lines of code is all it takes to start generating videos programmatically.
apiPage.pricingSubtitle: Simple, transparent pricing that scales with your usage.
apiPage.pricingProFeatures: For production apps and growing teams
apiPage.pricingEnterpriseFeatures: Dedicated support, SLAs, and volume discounts
apiPage.waitlistSubtitle: Be the first to build with the CreatorAI API. Join the developer waitlist and get notified when we launch.
apiPage.waitlistError: Something went wrong. Please try again.
apiPage.waitlistNote: We'll notify you when the API launches. No spam, ever.

meta.title: About
meta.description: Learn about CreatorAI — the AI video generation platform democratizing content creation for everyone.

hero.label: Our Story
hero.title: Built for Creators, by Creators
hero.description: CreatorAI is an AI video generation platform that makes professional-grade video creation accessible to everyone. No cameras, no crew — just your imagination.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description: We believe everyone has stories worth telling. Our mission is to democratize video creation by putting the power of advanced AI into the hands of every creator, regardless of budget or technical skill.

story.title: The Story
story.paragraph1: CreatorAI started with a simple idea: what if anyone could create stunning video content with just a text prompt?
story.paragraph2: Today, we're building the tools that turn that vision into reality — from AI script writing to voice cloning and style transfer. Our platform empowers creators to produce professional-quality videos without cameras, crews, or editing expertise.

team.title: The Team
team.description: We're a small, passionate team of engineers, designers, and creators who believe in the intersection of AI and human creativity.

engineering.title: Engineering
engineering.description: Building the AI pipeline that powers every generation — from diffusion models to real-time rendering.

design.title: Design
design.description: Crafting intuitive interfaces that make complex AI technology feel simple and delightful to use.

product.title: Product
product.description: Understanding creator workflows and translating them into features that actually ship.

innovation.title: Accessible Innovation
innovation.description: Advanced AI shouldn't require a PhD or a studio budget. We make cutting-edge technology simple and affordable for everyone.

accessibility.title: Quality Without Compromise
accessibility.description: We obsess over output quality. Every frame should look like it was made by a professional production team.

creatorFirst.title: Creator-First
creatorFirst.description: Every feature we build starts with the creator's workflow in mind. If it doesn't make your life easier, we don't ship it.

hero.label: Contact Us
hero.title: Get in Touch
hero.description: Have a question, feedback, or partnership opportunity? We'd love to hear from you.

privacy.metaDescription: CreatorAI Privacy Policy — how we collect, use, and protect your data.
privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: CreatorAI (operated by TheHolyLabs, Dortmund, Germany) respects your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, disclose, and safeguard your information when you use our AI video generation platform, mobile applications, and website.
privacy.dataCollectIntro: We collect information you provide directly to us, including:
privacy.dataCollectItem1: Your email address when you create an account or join our waitlist
privacy.dataCollectItem2: Payment information processed securely through our billing partners
privacy.dataCollectItem3: Content you create using our platform (prompts, generated videos)
privacy.dataCollectItem4: Usage data including device information, IP address, and interaction patterns
privacy.dataCollectItem5: Communications you send to us (support requests, feedback)
privacy.dataUseItem1: Provide, maintain, and improve our services
privacy.dataUseItem2: Process transactions and send related information
privacy.dataUseItem3: Send you technical notices, updates, and support messages
privacy.dataUseItem4: Respond to your comments, questions, and support requests
privacy.dataUseItem5: Analyze usage patterns to improve user experience
privacy.thirdPartiesIntro: We use trusted third-party services to operate our platform:
privacy.thirdPartiesItem1: Supabase — authentication and secure data storage
privacy.thirdPartiesItem3: AppsFlyer — attribution analytics for app installs
privacy.thirdPartiesItem4: Standard analytics tools for understanding usage patterns
privacy.cookiesContent: We use essential cookies to keep you logged in and remember your preferences. We also use analytics cookies to understand how visitors interact with our website. You can disable non-essential cookies through your browser settings.
privacy.retentionContent: We retain your personal information for as long as your account is active or as needed to provide you services. If you delete your account, we will delete your personal data within 30 days, except where we are required to retain it by law.
privacy.rightsIntro: Under the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR), you have the right to:
privacy.rightsItem3: Erase your data ("right to be forgotten")
privacy.rightsOutro: To exercise any of these rights, contact us at support@creatorai.art.
privacy.contactContent: If you have questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us at:

terms.metaDescription: CreatorAI Terms of Service — the rules and guidelines for using our platform.
terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.acceptanceContent: By accessing or using CreatorAI (operated by TheHolyLabs, Dortmund, Germany), you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree to these terms, do not use our services.
terms.accountContent: You must provide accurate information when creating an account. You are responsible for maintaining the security of your account credentials and for all activities that occur under your account.
terms.billingContent1: Paid plans are billed monthly or annually as selected. You may cancel at any time, and cancellation takes effect at the end of the current billing period.
terms.billingContent2: We offer a 14-day money-back guarantee on all paid plans. If you are not satisfied, contact us within 14 days for a full refund.
terms.contentOwnershipContent1: Content generated using CreatorAI on paid plans is yours to use for any lawful purpose, including commercial use. Free plan content may be used for personal, non-commercial purposes.
terms.contentOwnershipContent2: You may not use our platform to generate content that is illegal, harmful, or violates the rights of others.
terms.acceptableUseItem1: Use the service for any illegal purpose
terms.acceptableUseItem2: Generate content depicting real individuals without their consent
terms.acceptableUseItem3: Attempt to reverse-engineer our AI models
terms.acceptableUseItem4: Share your account credentials with others
terms.acceptableUseItem5: Circumvent usage limits or security measures
terms.ipContent: CreatorAI, its name, logo, and all related technology are the intellectual property of TheHolyLabs. Our AI models, algorithms, and training data remain our property. You retain ownership of your original prompts and creative direction.
terms.liabilityContent: To the maximum extent permitted by law, CreatorAI shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages resulting from your use of or inability to use the service.
terms.terminationContent: We reserve the right to suspend or terminate your account if you violate these Terms. You may delete your account at any time through the app settings.
terms.governingLawContent: These Terms are governed by the laws of Germany. Any disputes shall be resolved in the courts of Dortmund, Germany.
terms.changesContent: We may update these Terms from time to time. We will notify you of significant changes via email or through the app. Continued use after changes constitutes acceptance of the updated Terms.
terms.contactContent: For questions about these Terms, contact us at:
